description: StrainChain is the cannabis vertical of the Authentic Economy — AuthiChain (blockchain authentication) and QRON (identity art) combined into a single cannabis-native protocol that covers seed-to-sale, lab COA anchoring, METRC sync, dispensary verification, consumer scan-to-earn, and regulator audit trails.

personas.headline: Clone to exit bag, signed forever
personas.qron_theme: Emerald canopy — living soil earth tones, trichome frost, craft grow room
personas.why: Licensed cultivators have no clean way to prove that a specific batch — from clone to package — was grown, cured, and handled under their licence, leaving craft flower indistinguishable from diverted product on the shelf.
personas.value: Every batch gets a StrainChain identity bound to the cultivator's AuthiChain licence and packaged with a strain-specific QRON, turning craft provenance into a shelf-level marketing asset and a METRC-ready audit trail.

personas.headline: One upload, forever verifiable
personas.qron_theme: Clinical teal — sterile precision, analytical glassware, COA seal
personas.why: State-licensed cannabis testing labs issue thousands of COAs each month on paper and PDF, and those certificates are routinely altered, swapped, or re-used on product that was never actually tested.
personas.value: Every COA is hashed and anchored to AuthiChain at upload, bound to the lab's licence, and linked to the StrainChain batch — so dispensaries, regulators, and consumers can all verify that the potency, terpenes, and pesticide screens on the label are the ones the lab actually signed.

personas.headline: Scan to stock, scan to sell
personas.qron_theme: Retail emerald — dispensary counter, budtender glow, gold trim
personas.why: Dispensaries receive product from dozens of distributors every week and have no fast way to confirm that every SKU was grown by a licensed cultivator, tested by a licensed lab, and reconciled with METRC before it hits the shelf.
personas.value: Budtenders scan each package on receipt and at point of sale — confirming licensed origin, COA integrity, and METRC reconciliation in one tap — and the dispensary turns verification into a loyalty loop with consumer scan-to-earn rewards.

personas.headline: Scan it. Trust it. Earn on it.
personas.qron_theme: Sunset green — consumer friendly, strain art, mobile-first glow
personas.why: Cannabis consumers have almost no way to verify what they paid for — potency, terpenes, origin, and licence status all live on fragile labels and PDFs that are routinely swapped, faked, or out of date.
personas.value: Any consumer, on any phone, scans the strain QRON and sees the full lab panel, cultivator story, and licensed chain of custody — and can earn QRON rewards for every authenticated scan, turning verification into a loyalty and community layer for the brand.

personas.headline: Audit the whole state in one query
personas.qron_theme: State seal green — authoritative, audit-grade, enforcement-ready
personas.why: State cannabis control boards (California BCC, Colorado MED, Michigan LARA, and 20+ others) depend on METRC data that is manually entered, easy to falsify, and disconnected from the physical packages on dispensary shelves.
personas.value: Regulators get a read-only audit dashboard that reconciles METRC with the AuthiChain-anchored StrainChain ledger, exposes every unlicensed or tampered SKU in the state, and lets field inspectors scan any package to confirm provenance in under 3 seconds.

products.why: Cannabis consumers and dispensaries cannot easily verify seed-to-sale provenance, lab results, or licensed origin — exposing regulated markets to diversion and untested product.
products.value: StrainChain links every package to its cultivator licence, lab results, and terpene profile through an AuthiChain QRON, enabling compliant dispensary scanning, brand loyalty, and regulator-ready audit trails.
